response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive experience in software engineering, AI-agent infrastructure, and cloud-native development, with notable achievements at Google and Meta. While his background in AI/GenAI is less explicit, his recent work on MCP servers, node.js/TypeScript stacks, and large-scale systems aligns closely with the role's requirements. His open-source contributions and technical leadership potential are strong positives.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, Node.js, and cloud platforms (AWS/GCP) at Meta and Google
Direct experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP servers at Google, relevant to GenAI workflows
Proven track record of leading technical projects, mentoring teams, and delivering scalable solutions
concerns: Limited explicit experience with vector databases, RAG architectures, or multi-agent frameworks (preferred qualifications only)
No clear evidence of building data pipelines for structured/unstructured data in production AI systems
Master's/PhD in AI or related field is missing, though not strictly required
